name: americanhome
message: American Home Furniture and Mattress was founded by Mr. Emanuel "Mannie" Blaugrund in 1936 with the aspiration of establishing a community-based, high-quality, first-class furniture store offering value to customers at all price levels. The mission has been an overwhelming success, with current Owner and CEO Kenton Van Harten continuing in this tradition. American Home is New Mexican-owned and operated for over 84 years, employs 150 team members, and serves the State from locations in Albuquerque, Santa Fe, and Farmington. Today American Home Furniture and Mattress has six brick-and-mortar locations and a vibrant internet showroom. American Home Furniture and Mattress stays committed to being a high-quality, first-class furniture store offering value to customers at all price levels.
